'''Herylcha Baakos''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Councillor/Legends|councillor]] in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Herylcha Baakos believed that the [[Elomin/Legends|Elomin]] people were neglecting the [[Elom/Legends|Elom]], and ordered the Elomin to allow their neighbors equal opportunity to live on the surface of their homeworld. Baakos, however, remained oblivious to the fact that the Elom preferred living underground.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-09-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]'' {{1stm}}
